mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 10% signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 10%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates expanding real economic activity that drives corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO-HOUST combination falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day lagged increase in the federal funds rate above 2% signals imminent monetary tightening that raises equity discount rates, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly increase in GDP (GDPC1) above 3% signals robust demand conditions that lift corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline in 50%+ of quarters with GDPC1 growth above 3%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation reading above 2% triggers central bank policy tightening expectations that depress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a virtuous cycle of labor market strength and corporate hiring, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS-UNRATE combination falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in residential construction (RSAFS) above 5% indicates strong housing demand that boosts related sectors, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds 5%.
